items.title: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods Maintains Outperform on Travelers Companies, Raises Price Target to $305
items.description: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods  analyst Meyer Shields   maintains Travelers Companies (NYSE:TRV) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $304 to $305.
